corrections: Site analysis said 'json_ld_available: false' — this is PARTIALLY incorrect. JSON-LD exists on the page but is BreadcrumbList and VideoObject only. There is NO Product-type JSON-LD with pricing/offers. However, Open Graph meta tags provide og:price:amount, og:price:currency, og:brand, og:availability, og:image, and og:description — effectively serving the same role as a Product JSON-LD.

Site analysis noted 'Rating summary with count available' but didn't identify that the rating (3.8) and review count (1,271) are available via dataLayer ecommerce events AND via CSS star classes (ratingStar-100 = full, ratingStar-75 = 3/4, ratingStar-0 = empty).
Site analysis said 'no anti-bot' which is confirmed correct.

connectivity.notes: Direct HTTP returns complete server-rendered HTML with all product data. No JavaScript execution required. No anti-bot blocking.

extraction_methods.notes: No Product-type JSON-LD exists. Open Graph tags provide the core product data. All other fields are extractable from CSS selectors on server-rendered HTML. The dataLayer also contains rich product data (name, price, brand, SKU, category, rating, review count, availability).

status_code.notes: Set by scraper from HTTP response

remarks.notes: Set by scraper for any warnings/notes

examples: Eve's Petite Private Pleasure Wand - by Adam & Eve
title.notes: First h1 in the PDP container. There are 2 h1s on page (duplicate in sticky CTA). Use the first one or scope to .ae-product-details h1.

price.notes: og:price:amount gives the base/regular price ($54.99). The 'sale' or 'Only' price ($27.50) with promo code is in .jcpoffer-pricerange.v1. The page has TWO price displays: Reg price (.ae-normal-price .ae-price--normal) and promo 'Only' price (.jcpoffer-pricerange.v1). Both are in server-rendered HTML.

sale_price.notes: The promo/discount price after applying coupon code. May not be present on all products. Only the Reg/base price is in og:price:amount.

original_price.notes: Same as base price. The 'Reg' price. When product is on sale, it appears in .ae-sale-price .ae-price--was. When not on sale, it's in .ae-normal-price .ae-price--normal.

availability.notes: og:availability has 'instock'. The dataLayer has dimension7 = 'In Stock'. Page HTML shows 'Pre-Order - Ships' in .ae-product-details__info but the actual availability is In Stock per dataLayer/OG tag. The 'Pre-Order' text in .ae-product-details__info is for a 'similar product in stock' section that is hidden (class='hide').

image.notes: og:image gives the main product image. Multiple images available in .ae-product-carousel with thumbnails. Image URLs follow pattern: /cms/image/{id}-{id}-{width}x{height}.jpg

images.notes: All product images from the carousel/gallery. Filter out non-product images (tracking pixels, etc.)

examples: This petite & powerful wand massager is perfectly sized for your body. Enjoy 10 bed-rocking vibration modes. Order now for discreet shipping & free gift.
description.notes: og:description gives short description. The full product intro is in h2.ae-h2 class (below product images): 'Petite & Powerful Wand Gives You Amazing Clit-Gasms!'. Long description is in accordion .ae-accordion__content.ae-product-description.

sku.notes: SKU appears in text 'Need to speak to us? Quote item E194'. Also available in dataLayer ecommerceViewItemGA4.items[0].item_id.

category.notes: Available from JSON-LD BreadcrumbList and breadcrumb nav (.ae-breadcrumbs__link). Category path: Sex Toys > Vibrators > Clitoral Vibrators.

rating.js_extraction: const stars = document.querySelector('.pdp-star-ratings .ratingStars'); if (!stars) return null; const classes = Array.from(stars.children).map(c => c.className); const score = classes.reduce((sum, c) => { if (c === 'ratingStar-100') return sum + 1; if (c === 'ratingStar-75') return sum + 0.75; if (c === 'ratingStar-50') return sum + 0.5; if (c === 'ratingStar-25') return sum + 0.25; return sum; }, 0); return (score / classes.length).toFixed(1);
rating.notes: Rating is encoded in CSS star classes: ratingStar-100 (full), ratingStar-75 (3/4), ratingStar-50 (half), ratingStar-25 (1/4), ratingStar-0 (empty). 5 stars total. This product shows 100,100,100,75,0 = 3.75/5 ≈ 3.8. Also available in dataLayer metric2 and serverSideEvents dimension13.

review_count.notes: Review count in parentheses after star rating: '(1,271)'. Also in 'Based on 1,271 ratings' text. Also in dataLayer metric4.

key_features.js_extraction: const accordions = document.querySelectorAll('.ae-accordion'); for (const a of accordions) { if (a.textContent.includes('Key Features')) { return a.querySelector('.ae-accordion__content')?.textContent.trim(); } } return null;
examples:
The perfect size for personal & shared pleasure
Feel 10 functions of powerful vibration, pulsation & escalation
Velvety-smooth silicone head with flexible neck
...
key_features.notes: First accordion section with 'Key Features' heading. Contains unordered list (ul/li) of features.

full_description.js_extraction: const contents = document.querySelectorAll('.ae-accordion__content.ae-product-description'); return contents.length >= 2 ? contents[1].textContent.trim() : (contents[0]?.textContent.trim() || null);
examples: Take your wand pleasure sessions anywhere with Eve's Petite Private Pleasures Wand...
full_description.notes: Description accordion section with longer description text. Contains multiple paragraphs.

specifications.js_extraction: const rows = document.querySelectorAll('.ae-table tr'); return Array.from(rows).map(row => ({ key: row.querySelector('th')?.textContent.trim(), value: row.querySelector('td')?.textContent.trim() })).filter(r => r.key);

examples.value: Clitoral Stimulator, Waterproof, Multiple Vibration Modes, Vibrating, Multiple Speeds, Rechargeable

specifications.notes: Specifications are in a .ae-table inside the Specifications accordion. Each spec is a tr > th (label) + td (value).

color_variants.notes: Color swatches are in a fieldset with class .ae-swatch-selector__colors. Each swatch is an anchor with class ae-swatch-selector__container. This product has only 1 color (Aqua). Some products may have multiple.

size_variants.notes: Size selector exists but this product has no sizes. The container .ae-sizes__selector may be empty or have '----' placeholder.

jsonld_extraction.notes: No Product-type JSON-LD. BreadcrumbList provides category navigation. VideoObject contains product video metadata (name, description, thumbnailUrl, contentUrl, embedUrl). Open Graph meta tags compensate for missing Product JSON-LD.

tags.og:title: Product title (with ' - Vibrators | Adam & Eve' suffix)

og_tags_extraction.notes: OG tags provide comprehensive product data. og:price:amount is the base price before any promo codes. The promo 'Only' price requires CSS extraction.

datalayer_extraction.notes: dataLayer contains serverSideEvents array with rich ecommerce data including: Sku (E194), ProductName, Price, Brand, category hierarchy, rating (metric2/dimension13), review count (metric4), Colors array, Sizes array, availability (dimension7), as400 category/subcategory IDs.
datalayer_extraction.js_extraction: for (const evt of window.dataLayer) { if (evt.ecommerceViewItemGA4) return evt.ecommerceViewItemGA4.items[0]; }

variants.notes: Color and size variant selectors exist in the DOM. This product has 1 color (Aqua) and no sizes. Other products may have multiple colors/sizes. Variant selection does not require JavaScript click — the data is server-rendered.

mechanism_reassessment.justification: Confirmed: all product data (title, price, description, images, specifications, ratings, reviews, SKU, breadcrumbs, variants) is available in server-rendered HTML via direct HTTP. OG meta tags provide structured data. No JavaScript rendering needed. No anti-bot protection. http_requests is the correct mechanism.
